verses.text: Ahih hangin Jakob aw, nangmah hong piangsakpa, Israel aw, nangmah hong bawlpa, Topa in tu-in hih bang ci hi: “Hong honkhia khin ka hih manin lau kei in. Na min tawh kong sam khinzo a, nang pen kei-a' na hi hi
Tuite na kantan ciangin nang kong ompih ding a, gunte na kantan ciangin tui in hong tuumlo ding hi. Mei kantanin na pai ciangin na kang kei ding a, meikuangte in nang hong kangtumlo ding hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh kei pen Topa na Pasian, Israel-te' Siangtho Pa, nangmah hong honpa ka hi hi. Nangmah tatna dingin Egypt ka pia a, nangmah khekna dingin Ethiopia leh Seba ka pia hi
Nang pen keima mitah manpha-in, pahtakhuai-in, nangmah hong it ka hih manin nangma tangin mite ka pia a, na nuntakna khekna dingin mihingte ka pia hi
Nang hong ompih ka hih manin lau kei in. “Nisuahna lam panin na suanlekhakte kong paipih ding a, nitumna lam panin na mite kong kaikhawm ding hi

Keimah in leilu lam kiangah, ‘Piakhia in,’ leitaw lam kiangah, ‘Len nawn kei in; keima pian'sak ka bawlsa, keima minthan'na dingin ka pian'sak, keima min tawh a kilote khempeuh ahi, ka tapate a gamlapi panin, ka tanute leimong panin hong paipih un,’ ka ci ding hi,” a ci hi
Mit nei napi-in a mit a tawte, bil nei napi-in a bil a ngongte, hong paikhiatpih un

Minamte khempeuh kikaikhawmsak un la, mihingte kikhawmsak un. Amaute' lak panin kua in hih thu hong genkhia thei-in, a beisa huna nate kua in laktel thei ahi hiam? Amau' dikna a langsak dingin a tecite uh hong paipihsak un la, amaute a thu zasakin, man mah hi, cisak un

“Note pen keima teci na hi uh hi,” Topa in ci a, “Kei pen Amah ka hihna thu, nangmah in thei-in keimah nong upna ding, nong theihtelna dingin kong teelsa ka nasempa na hi hi. Kei' ma-in pasian omlo a, kei' khitah zong kuamah omlo ding hi
“Kei, keimah pen Topa ka hi a, kei simloh honpa dang omlo hi
Note lakah pasian dang a om ma-in honkhia-in, pulakin, ka genkhol hi. Tua ahih ciangin note pen keima teci na hi uh hi,” Topa in ci hi
“Kei pen Pasian ka hi a, a kipat cila kipanin zong kei pen Amah ka hi hi. Keima khutsung panin a lakhiazo kuamah omlo hi. Keima sepnate, a kua in hong khaktanzo ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi

Israel-te' Siangtho Pa, note a hong hon Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Note' hangin Babylon-ah galkapte puakin, khua kongpi sikzawl khempeuh ka kuaitan ding a, Khaldea mite' kikona pen tauna awging ka suaksak ding hi
Kei pen Topa, note' Siangtho Pa, Israel a Piangsakpa, note' Kumpi ka hi hi,” ci hi

Tuipi sungah lampi bawlin, tui lianpi sungah paina ding sul bawl a, leeng leh sakolte, galkapte leh galhangte Egypt gam pan paikhiatpihin, a tho thei nawnlo dingin amaute a lumcipsak, amaute pen meivak khau kisumit bangin a mitsak Topa in hih bangin ci hi
“Masa lama nate ciamteh kei un la, a beisa hun nate ngaihsun kei un
Tu-in a thak na khat ka bawl a, tu-in hong piangkhia hi. Note in theilo na hi uh hiam? Gamlakah lam lianpi khat ka bawl ding a, sehnel gamsungah gunte ka luangsak ding hi

Gamsate, ngiate, leh vasa-kalaohte in kei hong pahtawi ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh keima-a' dingin ka pian'sak mite in keimah hong phatna a genkhiat theihna dingun, keima teel mite' dawn dingin gamlakah tui pia-in, sehnel gamsungah gun ka luangsak hi
“Ahih hangin Jakob aw, ka min nong lo kei hi. Israel aw, kei nong cimtak hi
Meihal biakna dingin kei kiangah na tuu nong paipih kei a, biakpiakna tawh kei nong pahtawi kei hi. Piakna tawh nang kong vangiksak nai kei a, paknamtui piakna tawh kong gimsak nai kei hi

Kei-a' dingin paknamtui nong leisak nai kei a, nangmah in biakna sa a thaute tawh nong taiisak nai kei hi. Ahih hangin nang in na khialhna tawh kei tungah vangik na hong suan khin a, na mawhna tawh kei nong gimsak khin hi
Na thupalsatnate hong paihkhiatsakpa pen keimah ka hi a, kei ka hih manin na khialhnate ka ciamteh kei ding hi
“Thuman na hihna hong laktel in la, thu kikum khawm ni. Na dikna a kilatna dingin na thu hong sungkhia in
Na pu na pa masate uh na khial uh a, na makaite uh zong kei tungah hong khial uh hi
Na uliante un ka biakinn mindaisak uh ahih manin Israel tungah siatna ka tungsak a, Jakob ka mindaisak hi,” a ci hi.
